verse_text: Your wrath rested upon me, And You brought all Your billows over me. (Pause)

links.context: To the Hebrews, the sea was a frightening place, full of chaos and death. To be cast into the sea was to sink down into Hades. See [[PSA.87:7]], [[PSA.87:8]]. 2:3-10 Jonah's prayer echoes the language and imagery of the Psalms. See especially Ps 17:5, 7; 30:23; 41:8; 49:14; 68:2, 3; 119:1.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
